title: First Steps Baby Bath Time Bath Tub Support Sponge in Teddy Bear Shape for Babies from Newborn
features: Blue Teddy Baby Bath Sponge Support.
This baby bath support is a great addition to any baby collection, made from sponge material and available in two assorted colours, perfect support for baby during bathtime.
Helps to support baby during bathing.
Creates comfort, support and reassurance, making bathtime easier.
Can be used in an adult bath.
description: Blue Teddy Baby Bath Sponge Support. This baby bath support is a great addition to any baby collection, made from sponge material and available in two assorted colours, perfect support for baby during bathtime. Helps to support baby during bathing. Creates comfort, support and reassurance, making bathtime easier. Convenient and lightweight. Can be used in an adult bath. Suitable from birth onwards. Approximate measurements 47cm x 29.5cm x 4cm
